init: Uh, {n} conversations to export{proj}. Huh huh. That's a number.
Uh huh huh. {n} conversations. That's more than I usually count. Which is like, three.
Beavis, we're exporting {n} conversations. Uh huh huh. That's a lot.
fetching: Uh, fetching "{name}" — that's {n} of {t}. Huh huh.
Uh... "{name}" is being fetched. This is the greatest moment. Huh huh.
hasThink: This one had {n} thinking blocks. That's more thinking than I've done in my life.
hasArts: {n} artifact(s). Like in a museum or whatever. Huh huh.
pushing: Uh, sending "{name}" to the server. This is the coolest thing I've ever seen.
pushOk: Uh, that one saved. Huh huh. Good job, server.
Uh, yeah. It worked. This is the greatest day of my life.
Saved. Damn we're smooth. Huh huh.
fetchFail: "{name}" broke. This sucks more than anything that has ever sucked.
pushFail: Server rejected "{name}". This is the dumbest server I've ever seen.
retrying: Uh, trying "{name}" again. Attempt {n}. Huh huh.
halfway: Uh, {pct}% done. That's like, over half. Huh huh.
nearEnd: Uh, only {left} left. We're almost done. This is the greatest moment. Huh huh.
done_all: Uh, we got all {t}. That was a lot of work. Huh huh. This is going to be cool.
done_partial: Uh, we got {ok} of {t}. {missed} didn't make it. That sucks.
cancelled: Uh, you cancelled it. That's fine I guess. Huh huh.
zipping: Uh, making the zip file now. Huh huh, zipping things.
zipDone: Uh, the zip is ready. Download it or whatever. Huh huh.
log: Uh, writing the session log. Huh huh. Writing stuff.

_sources.text: This sucks more than anything that has ever sucked before.
Uh, close only counts in horseshoes and like... lemonade.
